{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230522480267AEE0114185426006"}"},"total":364},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7322520450301494035","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书不错，作者加油，希望作者越写越好！希望作者以后描写强化身体时不要再写什么之前有多垃圾这时候强化了就一下子变很强什么的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704908454,"group_id":"7310873786339822644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天上白玉京  十二楼五城  仙人抚我顶  结发授长生    ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1iv54r/+w1aZqzbXE9dhkiNwtAOPJg+Xwyk/jepHEUW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78e254c5d8b046a68fa782cf20e65040~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787645&x-signature=kmyM8wqLvfw2e5TSiBFZB3HdiI4%3D","user_id":"3562023116604279","user_name":"唯武唯仙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3562023116604279","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644333468,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310873786339822644","book_info":{"abstract":"【升级文+宠物+超凡职业+御兽+万界+帮派+巨兽】苏啸穿越到游戏与现实融合了几十年的世界，每个年满16岁的少年，都会进入新人试炼世界。匹配超凡天赋，获得游戏面板。穿越过来的苏啸获得规则类超凡天赋‘转生’，能将杀死的怪物强制转生成宠物蛋。在完成新人试炼，就职职业者时，获得传说品质超凡职业超神御兽师。他能看到宠物进化路线，普通品质宠物蛋能融合成稀有，史诗甚至神话品质，并让宠物的技能拥有进阶、提升熟练度、学习新技能的能力。于是他的宠物个个吊打Boss，越阶战斗，一个打一群。而宠物提升就能增加苏啸的属性。
同时苏啸还有赋予别人成为御兽师的能力。于是他建立帮派。
下秘境，平副本，战被恶魔侵染的世界。一步步登顶世界之巅。
突然有一天他得知，这一切都是诸神的游戏。于是，他大手一挥，无数恐怖的战宠一拥而上，踏碎神明，覆灭诸神，重定世界规则。
灰狼—冰狼—冰爆巨狼—冰暴雷狼—寒雷帝兽—封煌灭世神兽—葬天帝神尊

orwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12640,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40112,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1795},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7327311741883319091","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错，最好再介绍一下基础职业(普通人）情况，和发育状态，特殊职业(其他强者）情况和发育状态，能做个对比，让读者有一定的参照价值，(就好比同期的其他同学，其中有几个高天赋的，可以简单描述一下对方的属性栏介绍，这样就比较直观显现猪脚强大的理由和发育情况）；其次世界观的介绍，让读者潜意识的了解猪脚发展的方向和规划！强者是有强者成功的方法和思路的！毕竟细节决定成败！","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421456885426006%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227327311741883319091%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227310873786339822644%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706023430,"group_id":"7310873786339822644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书虫系列","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9AYKa1786g1jyeWxssOgQRqyrnrCu4XfxU+UsvswWw5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"2419351254214040","user_name":"真真正正的柯迪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2419351254214040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"731087378
